response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, demonstrated leadership in AI-agent infrastructure at Stripe, and deep technical breadth across languages and systems, but lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade AI/GenAI solutions, cloud-native RAG architectures, or vector databases — key requirements for this staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at Stripe
Extensive full-stack engineering background across cloud (AWS), TypeScript, and scalable systems
Strong track record of technical leadership, mentoring, and open-source contributions
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years dedicated to AI/GenAI production systems
Missing explicit experience with vector databases or RAG architecture design
Limited documentation of LLM optimization, multi-agent frameworks (e.g., LangGraph), or AI evaluation pipelines

key_factors.factor: Cloud platform and data pipeline experience
